text:
Comment on attachment 185156
beta1

> +Bindgen crashes on i386

It affects devel/llvm39 and devel/llvm40. I'm waiting on devel/llvm50[1] before reporting upstream. There was a similar issue in the past with devel/llvm40.

[1] devel/llvm-devel is too old to be of any use
